title: SKILL.md YAML frontmatter — protocol 1.0.0
description: Minimal contract for SKILL.md frontmatter at the 1.0.0 baseline. `additionalProperties: true` is intentional — skills carry arbitrary extension fields (allowed-tools, model preferences, etc.) and the protocol layer doesn't enumerate them. Future protocol bumps may tighten this.

protocol_version.description: Cadence protocol version this skill targets.

name.description: Skill identifier — matches the directory name.

description.description: Human-readable summary surfaced when the skill is listed.
